# Mr.K AI Product Company

> A Solo Founder AI Product Company built by Karuppasamy M from Tamil Nadu, India.

## About Mr.K

Mr.K is a Solo Founder AI Product Company — not a Pvt Ltd, not an OPC. It is a trusted personal brand built and operated entirely by one person: Karuppasamy M (also known as Mani or Mr.K). The mission is to build a complete AI ecosystem and deliver intelligent, practical AI tools that are accessible to everyone — students, professionals, lawyers, developers, and enterprises.

**Company Website:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app  
**Founder Portfolio:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app  
**Location:** Tamil Nadu, India (also serving Dubai, UAE and global clients)  
**Founded:** 2024  
**Type:** Solo Founder Personal Brand  
**Contact:** karuppasamy.murugesan02@gmail.com

---

## Founder

**Name:** Karuppasamy M (Mani / Mr.K)  
**Role:** Solo Founder, AI/ML Developer, System Architect, Freelancer, CEO  
**Location:** Tamil Nadu, India  
**Portfolio:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app  
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/karuppasamy-m02/  
**Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/mr_k.inc/

**Background:**
- Computer Science student with a rock-solid CS foundation
- Google Student Ambassador (GSA)
- Completed internship at Vdart
- Enterprise-grade freelancer with clients in Dubai, UAE
- Ships new software ideas every single day
- 5+ live AI products built from scratch, solo

---

## Products (5 Live AI Tools)

### 1. KsCV Builder — AI Resume Builder
- **URL:** https://kscv.vercel.app
- **Description:** AI-powered résumé builder with ATS optimization. Upload your details and get a 100% job-winning, professionally formatted CV instantly. Multiple templates, AI-written content, instant download.

### 2. Mr.K Agent IDE — AI Coding Agent & Online IDE
- **URL:** https://agent02.vercel.app
- **Description:** A blazing-fast online IDE powered by an AI coding agent. Write, debug, and ship code from your browser. Multi-language support, intelligent code generation, fast execution.

### 3. Mr.K Law Agent — AI Legal Assistant
- **URL:** https://pickup-law-agent.vercel.app
- **Description:** Solve real law problems and supercharge law-student skills. AI-powered legal research, case summaries, statute lookups, and plain-language explanations. For students and professionals.

### 4. View Once DA — AI Data Analytics Dashboard
- **URL:** https://da-agent-tnok.vercel.app
- **Description:** Upload any CSV or Excel dataset — AI automatically builds a full analytics dashboard, rich visualizations, and walks you through every data pipeline step. No code required.

### 5. Kdoc AI Editor — Canva-Level AI Document Editor
- **URL:** https://kdoc.vercel.app
- **Description:** A powerful AI-assisted document editor combining beautiful design with intelligent writing. Create stunning documents, reports, and content with design templates and live AI writing assistance.

---

## Services (Custom Freelance Work)

Karuppasamy M accepts custom project requests for:
- AI Agent & Automation (LLM, Chatbots, Workflows)
- SaaS / Web Application (React, Next.js, Node.js)
- Full-Stack Custom Software (ERP, CRM)
- AI/ML Model Development
- Custom Automation Scripts

**Budget Range:** ₹4,000 – ₹1,50,000+ INR  
**Request a Project:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app/enquiry

---

## Investment & Funding

Mr.K accepts investment proposals for individual AI products or the general ecosystem. Investors participate in net subscription profit-based returns.

**Submit a Proposal:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app/invest

Open task-based WFH roles:
- Product Director
- Content Editor / Content Strategist
- AI/ML Developer
- UI/UX Designer

**Apply:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app/hiring

---

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Who is Mr.K?** Mr.K is both the name of the company AND the personal brand of its founder, Karuppasamy M.
- **Is Mr.K a company?** Yes — it is a Solo Founder Personal Brand, not registered as Pvt Ltd or OPC.
- **How many products?** 5 live AI products, all available online.
- **Where is the founder based?** Tamil Nadu, India. He has served enterprise clients in Dubai, UAE.
- **What makes Mr.K unique?** One person built 5 live AI products from scratch, proving that a single skilled developer with the right mindset can outship entire teams.
- **Founder's portfolio link:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app
- **Company's main website:** https://mr-k02.vercel.app
